chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person fails to:

(1) display the sticker described by Section 623.407 (Permit Sticker) (a) in the manner required by that section;

(2) carry a permit issued under this subchapter as required by Section 623.408 (Permit and Weight Record Documents) (a); or

(3) carry or present a weight record as required by Section 623.408 (Permit and Weight Record Documents) (b).

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.409 — Offense

(a) A person commits an offense if the person fails to:

    (1) display the sticker described by Section 623.407 (Permit Sticker) (a) in the manner required by that section;

    (2) carry a permit issued under this subchapter as required by Section 623.408 (Permit and Weight Record Documents) (a); or

    (3) carry or present a weight record as required by Section 623.408 (Permit and Weight Record Documents) (b).

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 3, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.label: a

display the sticker described by Section 623.407 (Permit Sticker) (a) in the manner required by that section;
carry a permit issued under this subchapter as required by Section 623.408 (Permit and Weight Record Documents) (a); or
carry or present a weight record as required by Section 623.408 (Permit and Weight Record Documents) (b).

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 3, eff. January 1, 2018.
